💖 I strive to make the most ethical interactive lives possible 🙏 NO AI content 100% real, 0 insults, only reality and respect

I like doing live shows and fun & entertaining shorts:
Video games, incredible jokes (or not) and MAINLY Fortnite!

PS: I wear a costume on my head in my YouTube videos and lives to fight against physical harassment! I'm doing it to support subscribers who have suffered this and to show that the most important thing is your ❤️ we don't care about looks, that's not going to stop us! Over time, it has become the symbol of the channel, I have never taken it off since I have been showing myself in front of the camera since 2019, and I always try to entertain you as best as I can while conveying kindness and joy!

To join Team FiFou there is only one way to subscribe to the channel 👍
God bless you and have a great rest of your day!

title: Guild Wars 2
description:
Guild Wars is a franchise that reshaped the MMORPG landscape. From its 2005 debut to the evolving world of Guild Wars 2, it has challenged genre conventions, prioritizing skill-based combat, strategic depth, horizontal progression, and player-driven storytelling. With a focus on cooperative play, competitive PvP, and a persistent, online world that responds to player actions, Guild Wars continues to define what modern online RPGs can be. Whether you're here for lore, gameplay, or community-driven content, this channel celebrates a game that dares to do things differently - and has the legacy to prove it!

Messages and livestream chat is moderated by ArenaNet staff members. The full Moderation Policy is available here:
https://www.guildwars2.com/en/legal/social-media-moderation-policy/

ESRB Rating: TEEN with Blood, Mild Language, Use of Alcohol, Violence. Visit www.esrb.org for rating info.

Europe: PEGI 12 -- US/Canada: Teen.

PEGI 12 for violence, bad language.

description: FGTeeV, the Family Gaming team, brings you the premiere YouTube channel for gamers. The hyperactive crew of gamers invites you to dive first into their world of gaming and sketch comedy. Whether it’s PC, iPad, Android, XBOX One, Wii U, Playstation 4, 5 or Nintendo Switch... title: GamersPrey
description:
The official YouTube channel of GamersPrey. All the latest videogame trailers and full gameplay walkthroughs in full HD (And 4K) quality, all in one place. All gameplay videos are recorded and edited by me.

F.A.Q:

Why do you watermark gameplay?

We watermark our own personal gameplay so that when someone reuploads the video, it makes it easier for us to claim it as our footage.

Why don't you add commentary to your videos?

We feel that commentary ruins gameplay. There are many other channels doing commentary on their videos. 

I saw a video with the exact same gameplay on their channel. What can I do?

Feel free to message us a link to the video and we will deal with it from there.

My question is not listed?

Feel free to message us, we usually respond to messages the same day. pr[at]gamersprey.com

title: Sonic the Hedgehog
description:
The official home of Sonic the Hedgehog on YouTube! 

ESRB EVERYONE to EVERYONE 10+. Visit esrb.org for rating information.

Welcome to the official channel for Sonic the Hedgehog: videogame icon, nemesis to Dr. Eggman, chili dog fan and the fastest hedgehog on earth. From the day Sonic The Hedgehog was released in June 1991, SEGA's famous blue hedgehog instantly became an icon for a generation of gamers. Defined by his super-fast speed, this cool edgy character has a readiness for all types of adventure. In the more than thirty years since he first raced on to videogame consoles, Sonic the Hedgehog has become a true global phenomenon. As well as videogames, SEGA's iconic blue hedgehog has enjoyed huge success in areas such as comics, apparel, toys, and even starred in several of his own animated series as well as a featured film series.

title: Scump
description:
Seth “Scump” Abner is considered one of the greatest professional Call of Duty players in history. After 14 successful years, he retired in early 2023. During his professional career, he amassed 30 major tournament wins, back-to-back X Games Gold medals in 2014 & 2015, Esports Console Player of the Year in 2016, World Champion in 2017, and World Series of Warzone Champion in 2021. He was also listed in the 2022 Forbes 30 under 30 in Gaming and became the first Esports Athlete sponsored by Oakley. Often referred to as the “King” by his fans, Scump finished his career playing for the Call of Duty League Team OpTic Texas.

title: Markiplier
description:
Hi, I'm Markiplier. I make videos. 

From quality content to meme-able garbage, from scary games to full-on interactive movies you'll find it all. You will, actually. I have over 5000 videos so I'm sure there's something you'd like. 

Maybe you like horror games, or funny games, or comedy sketches, or animations, or compilations, or reactions, or reviews, or challenges, or cryptic lore, or mind-crippling ennui, or stuff-that-is-guaranteed-to-probably-make-you-cry? Whatever you're into I'm sure there's something for you down in the briny deep of my video page. So why not dive in?

Or don't. Life is yours to choose after all.
